agents_intake.note: Repo-local AGENTS workflow, issue-first rule, blueprint-first rule, and validation ladder were incorporated before non-trivial writes.

issue_branch_linkage.note: Issue #1 and the original migration branch were created with the repo helper script.

followup_issue_linkage.note: After PR #2 merged and issue #1 closed, follow-up issue #3 and branch feat/3-replace-concept-demo-rtr-windows-with-grower-approved-periods were created with the repo helper script for the remaining RTR calibration-input gap.

followup_branch_validation.note: The blocked issue #3 branch is being kept in sync with merged maintenance and delivery work so the next RTR calibration slice starts from current main.

harness_setup.note: docs/architecture and .rah starter surfaces were initialized.

workspace_audit.note: Target/source delta is captured in docs/architecture/00_workspace_audit.md.

system_brief.note: Target boundaries are captured in docs/architecture/01_system_brief.md.

implementation_gate.note: The backend package migration slice, config contract, and smoke validation all landed.

frontend_scope.note: The source frontend/ Vite app is the canonical UI migration path.

frontend_migration.note: The canonical Vite frontend has been migrated into frontend/, sample CSV fixtures were copied into data/, and local typecheck/lint/build all passed.

browser_smoke.note: Live browser smokes passed for the canonical dashboard runtime, the RTR panel extension, the KAMIS produce price panel, the 14-day trend overlay, and the latest issue #12 layout rebalance on 127.0.0.1:8000/4173. The saved desktop/mobile screenshots confirmed the weather, produce-price, and RTR panels now stretch against their content without the AI card compressing that row.

bundle_review.note: Lazy boundaries plus explicit vendor chunk grouping reduced the production bundle into sub-500 kB chunks, and a built-preview browser smoke passed without runtime errors.

rtr_panel_extension.note: The existing Daegu weather panel was preserved and a neighboring rolling-24h RTR monitor was adopted using a WUR/TomatoesNZ-style example strategy line plus forecast-linked steering targets.

rtr_calibration_pipeline.note: RTR coefficients were externalized into configs/rtr_profiles.json, exposed through /api/rtr/profiles, and backed by a calibration script plus daily-aggregation fitting utilities. A dry-run calibration against the sample CSVs completed successfully into artifacts/rtr-calibration/test_rtr_profiles.json.

rtr_curated_window_contract.note: Curated good-production windows now live in configs/rtr_good_windows.yaml, the calibration service can prefer those windows before applying the existing quality filters, and the CLI exposes --windows plus --selection-mode without changing the runtime /api/rtr/profiles contract.

rtr_window_input_hardening.note: RTR good-window loading now fails closed for malformed dates, unsupported crop keys, non-list crop roots, and ambiguous enabled flags, and the calibration CLI surfaces those input errors explicitly instead of silently falling back.

rtr_curated_profiles.note: The concept-demo good-production windows were enabled, configs/rtr_profiles.json was regenerated from them, and a temp-port browser smoke confirmed the RTR panel now renders House-fit status with curated-window metadata.

ai_rtr_context.note: Frontend AI consult/chat payloads now include compact Daegu weather context plus RTR profile/live/forecast summaries, and the OpenAI prompt contract explicitly documents those fields.

ai_live_validation.note: Representative live OpenAI consult/chat calls succeeded with the repo-local OPENAI_API_KEY, including a post-PR-refresh re-smoke after CI preparation; the outputs used live weather plus RTR steering context instead of falling back to a recentSummary-only reading.

github_ci_workflow.note: A GitHub Actions CI workflow now mirrors the local validation ladder with backend Poetry ruff/pytest and frontend npm lint/build jobs on push and pull_request events.

github_ci_node24_action_runtime.note: Bug issue #4 upgraded actions/checkout, actions/setup-node, and actions/setup-python onto Node24-capable majors; PR #5 merged, and both the fix branch plus the refreshed issue #3 branch CI passed without the previous Node.js 20 deprecation annotations.

github_project_sync.note: Issues #6, #8, #10, and #12 all moved through Running -> Validating and closed through merged PRs, while issue #3 remains the blocked follow-up item.

live_produce_price_panel.note: A KAMIS-backed `/api/market/produce` endpoint, frontend polling hook, and dashboard panel now surface curated live tomato/cucumber market prices with docs-sample auth fallback; PR #7 merged this slice into main.

produce_price_trend_overlay.note: Issue #8 / PR #9 landed the trailing 14-day actual trend plus forward 14-day 3y/5y/10y seasonal-normal overlays from KAMIS `periodRetailProductList`, and issue #10 / PR #11 hardened that panel so card snapshots survive trend failures while the chart explicitly labels retail-average history versus snapshot prices and exposes per-line sample coverage.

rtr_good_production_windows.note: The remaining follow-up work is tracked on issue #3, but the calibration input upgrade is blocked until grower-approved good-production periods are available.

dashboard_layout_rebalance.note: Issue #12 / PR #13 widened the overall dashboard shell, moved the AI advisor into its own responsive column above the weather/produce/RTR row, and gave the produce-price chart a dedicated wide chart area so cards and graph height scale more naturally on desktop while still stacking cleanly on mobile.
